title: Allegion: Security And Earnings Growth As Operations Improve
text: Allegion continued growth during Q2 with revenue increasing by 3.5% and the completion of the Access Technologies acquisition from SWK. Inventory remains high, but pricing has shown improvements though the International segment remains challenging, particularly with the outlook for slowing economic growth in Europe.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Allegion (ALLE) Stock for Now
